heading: Biennial report to Congress
label: 701n–1 Biennial report to Congress
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 113–121section 2201 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , and every 2 years thereafter, the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Environment and Public Works of the Senate and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives a report detailing the amounts expended in the previous 5 fiscal years to carry out Corps of Engineers projects under .June 10, 2014section 701n of this title

children.label: i
children.text: each structure, feature, or project for which amounts are expended, including the type of structure, feature, or project and cost of the work; and

children.label: ii
children.text: how the Secretary has repaired, restored, replaced, or modified each structure, feature, or project or intends to restore the structure, feature, or project to the design level of protection for the structure, feature, or project.
